assumptions.timeframes: 15m candles, 1h RSI derived from hourly closes built from 15m candles
assumptions.fee: Taker fee 0.05% on entries, safety orders and exit
assumptions.entry: Next 15m candle open after confirmed TradingView signal
assumptions.same_candle_priority: If TP and SL are both touched within one candle, SL is counted first
assumptions.portfolio: All eligible pairs are processed together in chronological order
assumptions.cooldowns: 3h GRID DCA pause after SL, one long and one short webhook per connection every 5 minutes
assumptions.trend_filter: GRID DCA 2.7 blocks long signals during BTC/ETH daily downtrend and short signals during BTC/ETH daily uptrend; neutral daily trend remains tradable

report_variant.description: Free 4/4/4, Start 8/8/8, Premium 12/12/12 open trade limits
